focus: traceability — validation, file/path claims, and template-fidelity evidence

findingDetails.title: Changelog fails the required documentation validator
findingDetails.evidence: Validator reports missing_required_section overview for changelog; the file moves from H1 to What's Included without an overview section.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add a ## 1. OVERVIEW section or equivalent overview heading and rerun validate_document.py --type reference.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Only changelog/v1.0.0.0.md produced a blocking validation error in the target-doc validation batch.

findingDetails.title: Changelog lists a reference file that does not exist after dissection
findingDetails.evidence: The changelog claims references/feature_catalog_creation.md is included, but the references directory and route-map expose README.md, examples.md, and common_pitfalls.md.
findingDetails.recommendation: Replace the stale bullet with the actual dissected reference set or remove it from the included-file list.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Direct references directory read showed no feature_catalog_creation.md; references/README.md routes to examples.md and common_pitfalls.md.

noveltyJustification: First iteration against a fresh restarted packet; both findings are new active P1 traceability/validation issues.
edgeCases: Template scaffold warnings are non-blocking under the requested 0-blocking validation requirement.
Placeholder links inside fenced scaffolds were not counted as active broken relative links.
Full four-iteration loop execution is outside this leaf iteration contract; remaining dimensions are carried forward.
ruledOut: No active finding for fenced template placeholder links.
No active finding for examples.md code-fence related-reference excerpt because the live target exists.

focus: maintainability — dissected-reference split, duplication risk, and existing finding refinement

findingDetails.title: Changelog fails the required documentation validator

findingDetails.title: Changelog lists a reference file that does not exist after dissection
findingDetails.evidence: Changelog still names references/feature_catalog_creation.md while the current route-map names README.md, examples.md, and common_pitfalls.md.

findingDetails.title: Root catalog template still embeds the full per-feature scaffold despite a dedicated snippet template
findingDetails.evidence: SKILL.md assigns feature_catalog_template.md to the root scaffold and feature_catalog_snippet_template.md to per-feature files, but the root template also embeds a full per-feature scaffold.
findingDetails.recommendation: Keep the full per-feature scaffold only in feature_catalog_snippet_template.md and replace the duplicate root-template section with a pointer.
findingDetails.scopeProof: SKILL.md lines 105-106 separates root and per-feature resources; both asset templates publish a per-feature scaffold.

noveltyJustification: One new P2 maintainability finding was added; two existing P1s were revalidated but not materially changed.
traceabilityChecks: resource contract versus asset template comparison
edgeCases: Template validator warnings are non-blocking under the user's 0-blocking validation requirement.
The duplicated per-feature scaffold is maintainability risk independent of validator blocking status.
User requested iterations 002-004 in one continuation, but this leaf-agent contract permits one review iteration per execution.
ruledOut: No new P1 filed for duplicate scaffold because it is maintainability drift, not a current validation/path blocker.
No active finding filed against references/README.md as duplicate workflow content.
